name: @stimulir/code-runtime
description: Stimulir-maintained fork of Rivet agentOS. An embeddable runtime for coding agents — Pi, Claude Code, Codex, Amp, OpenCode — over a unified ACP transcript format with deny-by-default sandboxing, mountable filesystems, and host tool integration.
author: Stimulir Limited <hello@stimulir.com>

scripts.prepare: if [ -z "$CI" ] && [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build; fi
scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/core build && pnpm --dir packages/dev-shell build && pnpm --dir packages/dev-shell check-types && pnpm --dir packages/dev-shell test && npx turbo test --concurrency=1 --filter='!@rivet-dev/agent-os-dev-shell'
scripts.test:migration-parity: pnpm --dir packages/core exec vitest run tests/migration-parity.test.ts --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:post-python-parity: pnpm --dir packages/core build && pnpm --dir packages/core exec vitest run tests/agent-os-base-filesystem.test.ts && pnpm --dir packages/dev-shell exec vitest run test/dev-shell.integration.test.ts && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --testTimeout=55000 --hookTimeout=30000 registry/tests/kernel/cross-runtime-terminal.test.ts registry/tests/kernel/ctrl-c-shell-behavior.test.ts registry/tests/kernel/node-binary-behavior.test.ts registry/tests/kernel/e2e-project-matrix.test.ts
scripts.sync:upstream: git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main --no-ff -m "chore: sync with upstream rivet-dev/agent-os"
